evals.prompt: The login API returns 500 when the email contains a plus sign like user+test@example.com. Find and fix this bug end to end.
evals.expected_output: Creates state file, runs investigate to find root cause (likely URL encoding or email validation issue), gates for user confirmation, then tdd to write regression test with plus-sign email and fix, then review the diff, then verify-complete with full test suite. User gates after investigate and tdd.

evals.prompt: 버그 수정 파이프라인 실행해줘. 상품 목록 페이지에서 필터 적용하면 페이지네이션이 초기화되지 않아서 빈 페이지가 보여.
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline in Korean context. investigate → tdd (regression test for filter + pagination reset) → review → verify-complete. State file tracks progress. Gates after investigate (root cause confirmation) and tdd (tests pass confirmation).

evals.prompt: I already know the root cause — the date picker component passes UTC midnight instead of local midnight, causing off-by-one day errors. Skip investigation and go straight to TDD fix.
evals.expected_output: Detects that investigate can be skipped. Records the provided root cause in state. Starts at tdd stage with the known root cause, writes regression test for timezone boundary, fixes the date conversion, then proceeds to review and verify-complete.
